subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. 1904
subcodes.first_line: Nothing affects me more than the actions and conduct of the friends. The main reason I was ill]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هیچ چیز بقدر اعمال و افعال احباء در وجود من موثر نیست این چند روز که من مریض بودم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
